headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took a thrilling 11-9 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. The Washington Nationals edged the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. Richard Lovelady secured the save for the Nationals.

Injuries and availability impact are affecting several teams. The Kansas City Royals placed left-hander Matt Strahm on the 15-day injured list due to right knee inflammation. The San Diego Padres also placed right-hander Matt Waldron on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury. Other teams with injured players include the Los Angeles Dodgers, Colorado Rockies, Seattle Mariners, Colorado Rockies, Athletics, and Miami Marlins.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Oakland Athletics acquired second baseman Alika Williams in a trade with the Pittsburgh Pirates, sending right-hander Kyle Robinson to the Pirates. The Athletics also traded right-hander Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. Additionally, the Athletics acquired left-hander José Suarez from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded outfielder Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for center fielder Alek Thomas.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Victory Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, winning 11-9. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 3-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. Richard Lovelady secured the save for the Nationals.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a close game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought 7-6 win over the Cleveland Guardians, with Andrew Abbott earning the win and Tejay Antone securing the save.

top_news.title: **Royals Place Strahm on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Kansas City Royals left-hander Matt Strahm has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right knee inflammation.

top_news.title: **Athletics Acquire 2B Alika Williams in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics have traded RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates in exchange for 2B Alika Williams.
